prompt: This package evaluates arithmetic expressions. tokenizer.py is implemented and working. Implement evaluate(expr) in evaluator.py so that ALL tests in test_evaluator.py pass. It must support +, -, *, / with correct precedence, parentheses, unary minus, and floats; raise ZeroDivisionError on division by zero; and raise ValueError on malformed input. Do not edit the test file or tokenizer.py. Run the tests to verify before finishing.
